name: dropship-platform
description: Dropshipping platform with frontend and backend services

scripts.start: concurrently "cd dropship-backend && npm start" "cd dropship-frontend && npm start"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd dropship-backend && npm install && cd ../dropship-frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd dropship-backend && npm run build && cd ../dropship-frontend && npm run build
scripts.test: cd dropship-backend && npm test && cd ../dropship-frontend && npm test
